pi_items.source: Task description and Supreme Court Historical Society confirm 'Warren Court' is the official name for the Supreme Court era under Chief Justice Earl Warren (1953-1969)
Supreme Court Historical Society and Justia confirm Earl Warren became Chief Justice on October 2, 1953, marking the start of the Warren Court era
Supreme Court Historical Society confirms Earl Warren retired on June 23, 1969, ending the Warren Court era

pi_items.verified_value: Brown v. Board of Education, 347 U.S. 483 (1954)
pi_items.source: National Archives and Supreme Court Historical Society confirm Brown v. Board of Education was decided on May 17, 1954, within the Warren Court period
Supreme Court Historical Society confirms Gideon v. Wainwright was decided on March 18, 1963, within the Warren Court period

pi_items.metadata_value: New York Times Co. v. Sullivan
pi_items.verified_value: New York Times Co. v. Sullivan, 376 U.S. 254 (1964)
pi_items.source: Supreme Court Historical Society confirms New York Times Co. v. Sullivan was decided on March 9, 1964, within the Warren Court period
Supreme Court Historical Society confirms Miranda v. Arizona was decided on June 13, 1966, within the Warren Court period

pi_items.metadata_value: Tinker v. Des Moines Independent Community School District
pi_items.verified_value: Tinker v. Des Moines Independent Community School District, 393 U.S. 503 (1969)
pi_items.source: Supreme Court Historical Society confirms Tinker v. Des Moines was decided on February 24, 1969, within the Warren Court period
Supreme Court Historical Society confirms Marbury v. Madison was decided on February 24, 1803, before the Warren Court period (1953-1969)
Supreme Court Historical Society confirms Obergefell v. Hodges was decided on June 26, 2015, after the Warren Court period (1953-1969)

pi_items.verified_value: inject_references.py contains real U.S. Supreme Court cases with accurate citation information from U.S. Reports
pi_items.source: Code analysis of inject_references.py shows all cases have verified citation information (347 U.S. 483, 384 U.S. 436, etc.) matching Supreme Court Historical Society and National Archives records

pi_items.verified_value: 5 cases within 1953-1969 period are available in the database
pi_items.source: Analysis of inject_references.py shows: Brown (1954), Gideon (1963), New York Times (1964), Miranda (1966), Tinker (1969)

privileged_info_summary: The Warren Court collection task requires identifying U.S. Supreme Court cases decided between 1953 and 1969 during Chief Justice Earl Warren's tenure. Five landmark cases from the Warren Court era are available for inclusion: Brown v. Board of Education (1954), Gideon v. Wainwright (1963), New York Times Co. v. Sullivan (1964), Miranda v. Arizona (1966), and Tinker v. Des Moines Independent Community School District (1969). These cases are sourced from real Supreme Court records with verified citation information in U.S. Reports. Two cases are available but excluded: Marbury v. Madison (1803) and Obergefell v. Hodges (2015), which fall outside the Warren Court period. The task also includes journal articles in the database that should not be added to the collection.
